pokemon:wiglett.name: Wiglett
pokemon:wiglett.summary: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.
Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

pokemon:wugtrio.name: Wugtrio
pokemon:wugtrio.summary: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
